keys.description: When true (default), tenancy::TenantProvisioned dispatches SeedDefaultRegionForTenantJob. Off = the tenant lands without a default Region; callers must create one before any Branch or Membership can be provisioned. Off is only safe in migration harnesses where a bespoke seed handles the invariant.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Used by SeedDefaultRegionForTenantJob when neither the tenant's registered country nor the billing contact's country resolves to a country present in `data/country-defaults.json`.

When true, SeedDefaultRegionForTenantJob is dispatched to a queue. When false, RegionProvisioner runs synchronously in the tenant-provisioning transaction. Sync provisioning is safer (the tenant is never briefly regionless) but slower — the async path is default because tenant onboarding must feel instant.
Cron expression for ReconcileDefaultRegionInvariantJob. Daily 03:15 UTC by default.
When true, drift (a tenant with 0 or 2+ default regions) fires the alert per `config('monitoring.channels.compliance')`. Off = drift is only logged; ops must poll audits.

When true, the reconciler heals drift automatically (promote-oldest OR re-seed-from-country_code). Off by default — surface + acknowledge before healing. Turn on in production when ops has built confidence in the drift patterns.

When true, POST /api/v1/regions refuses without a fully-formed tax_config. When false (default), the observer auto-fills from country-defaults.json when the caller omits it — tenants get a sensible tax posture out of the box + can refine it later.

When true (default), Region create refuses when the country_code is not in `data/country-defaults.json`. Set to false to support supranational zones (EU, ASEAN) or exotic markets before their defaults are shipped — the tenant admin then supplies every field explicitly.

When true, currency changes on a Region-in-use are allowed with an audit + a warning. Off by default — changing currency invalidates historical financial reconciliation. On is a break-glass switch for migration corrections; require ops sign-off + a compliance review.

Days a soft-deleted Region stays in the archived state before PurgeArchivedRegionsJob hard-deletes it. Default 730 (2 years — financial retention). Compliance floor: 365 (1 year). Tenants may EXTEND per the tier matrix (Enterprise up to 2555 = 7 years matching audit retention).

Days audit rows produced by this module survive after their source Region is hard-deleted. Default 2555 (7 years — financial retention). Read-only reference — the actual retention is enforced by the audit module's retention policy.
TTL for `rgn:default:{tenant_id}` — the cached default-region lookup used by DefaultRegionResolver on every tenant-plane request that lacks an explicit X-Region-Id header.
TTL for `rgn:list:{tenant_id}` — cached region list used by the tenant admin UI + the X-Region-Id resolver.
